action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 2 models gave AP=0.2838 (new best, +0.85% over single). Have 4.35h, 11 iters left. Analysis: Adding a third diverse model should boost further. Each 100-epoch training takes ~36min. I can afford ~2 more training runs. Decision: Train a third model with different config (deeper, different seed) for 100 epochs, then ensemble all three.
